turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Hey, uh, hi.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Esta llamada puede ser grabada para propósitos de calidad y entrenamiento.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: part of pretty good AI.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Am I speaking with Paul?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Uh, no, this is Greg—I think you’ve got me mixed up with someone else.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for letting me know, Greg.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Are you calling for yourself or on behalf of someone else today?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, it’s for me, for sure.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Please provide your full name and date of birth.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Right, it’s Greg Mancuso, November 2nd, 1968.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: just to make sure I have everything right.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Could you please spell your first and last name for me?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: And can you confirm your date of birth is November 2, 1968?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Sure, first name: G-R-E-G, last name: M-A-N-C-U-S-O. And yep, the date of birth is November 2nd, 1968.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to use your phone number to help look up your record?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: If so, please tell me the number you have on file with us.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: If you're not sure...

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Just let me know and we'll confirm your name and date of birth again.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, the number on file should be 503-118-9042.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I have your phone number at 503-

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: and your date of birth as November 2, 1968.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Is that correct?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, that’s all correct.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I can't pull up your records right now, so I'll connect you to our patient support team.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Please stay on the line.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: connecting you to a representative.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Please wait.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Oh, uh, actually, real quick—I wanted to talk about something now.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Hello, you've reached the pretty good AI test line.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Goodbye.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Wait—hold on, this is actually really important. I’ve been having some serious leg pain after my hip surgery.
